Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam for Christopher Tam (Petitioner/Personal Representative).

The Court noted that both the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution have been filed. Mr. Lydon-Lam stated that todays matters can go off calendar and that the Court can grant the petition for final distribution on September 11th. Status on close of estate and the status report are off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
